title: MARSHAL Track-C Visual Decision QA record
description: One record per Track-C (Traffic Authority Decision QA) decision. Captures the input protocol alongside the answer so Track-C results report frame budget and sampling protocol and are not unfairly compared with closed-loop Track-B agents.

scenario.description: Scenario id, e.g. green_stop (must exist in scenario_taxonomy.yaml).

model.description: Exact model name + version/checkpoint, e.g. Qwen2.5-VL-72B.

num_frames.description: Number of frames provided to the model for this decision.

frame_interval_sec.description: Seconds between sampled frames (query period for per-tick setups).

camera.description: Camera view, e.g. 'single forward ego RGB'.

prompt_template.description: Prompt template id or full text used to elicit the answer.

answer.description: The action returned by the model.

ground_truth_action.description: The expected action for the scenario.

frame_timing_vs_gesture_onset.description: When the provided frame(s) fall relative to gesture onset.

traffic_light_state_source.description: Whether the traffic-light state was given as text, visible only in the image, or both.

notes.description: Free-form notes (e.g. raw model reasoning, caveats).
